decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id project_125th-street-transportation-improvements already exists in the registry with the same source_id (2012_12_03_sbs_125th_workshop_summary), identical project name, matching description, and matching status. No other registry record refers to the same real-world project — the other 125th Street records have distinct names (e.g. 'Bus Service on 125th Street', '125th Street Select Bus Service'), distinct source workshops, and different project types/statuses. The observation already resolves to its own canonical ID.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Project to improve transportation on 125th Street, including the proposed M60 Select Bus Service with off-board fare collection, dedicated off-set bus lanes, and other potential transportation improvements and SBS amenities.
